name: Renaud Adams
background: Mr. Adams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining IAMGOLD, he was President and CEO of New Gold Inc. and previously served as President and CEO of Richmont Mines Inc. until its sale to Alamos Gold in 2017.

companies.name: IAMGOLD Corporation
companies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
